scenes.text:
A tree that cannot bend will break
in the storm. Be the bamboo.

Rigidity kills. In business, in relationships, in life. The people who survive are not the strongest. They are the most adaptable. Plans
will fail. Markets will crash. People will leave. Your ability to bend, pivot, and adapt determines whether you survive or shatter.

Stop trying to control everything. Control what you can. Adapt to what you cannot. When life pushes you
in an unexpected direction, do not fight it. Flow with it and find the opportunity in the chaos.

Flexibility is not weakness. It
is the ultimate strength.

How have you adapted to a tough
situation? Share your pivot. Follow for adaptability.
